{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Meia's Vessels
| introduced = ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings
}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Meia]]'s eyes shine as brightly orange as her new [[Vessels]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c22">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
